data.acceptance:
- `knots-canonical-metadata.test.ts` `describe("createLease canonical fields", ...)` has one `it()` per provider in `AgentProviderId` (minus `unknown`).
- Each `it()` starts from a realistic `settings.toml` agent shape, runs through `toCanonicalLeaseIdentity` → `toExecutionAgentInfo` → `createLease`, and asserts the exact `kno lease create` argv.
- New test file `src/lib/__tests__/knots-lease-roundtrip.test.ts` (or named per planner choice) covers create → `kno lease show --json` → assert canonical fields per provider.
- The round-trip test is in the unit suite (mock `execFile`) — per hermetic test policy it does NOT shell out to a real `kno` binary.
- `bun run test` is green.
